name: contextseal
description: Graph-backed certification for high-risk data changes

scripts.ai:probe: node --input-type=module -e "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; const version = spawnSync('ollama', ['--version'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); if (version.error) { console.log('WARN local AI runtime unavailable: ollama not found on PATH'); process.exit(0); } const list = spawnSync('ollama', ['list'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); const versionText = (version.stdout || version.stderr || '').trim(); if (versionText) console.log(versionText); if (list.status === 0) { const listText = (list.stdout || '').trim(); console.log(listText || 'No local models listed.'); console.log('PASS local AI runtime available'); process.exit(0); } console.log(`WARN local AI runtime installed but not ready: ${((list.stderr || list.stdout || '').trim() || `ollama list exit ${list.status ?? 'unknown'}`)}`); process.exit(0);"
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm test && npm run demo && npm run sandbox && npm run pr:bundle && npm run pr:draft -- --dry-run
